title: Portfolio Module launches next week
content_html:
The Cryptool Portfolio Module goes live next week.

The module gives you one place to see every investment, with:

  • A clear view of how holdings are allocated across assets and categories
  • Status and performance for each investment
  • Visibility into vesting schedules and upcoming unlock dates

This is the first step of a wider Portfolio and OTC release, with more capability arriving shortly after launch.
author: Cryptool
